title: Operation 'Y' & Other Shurik's Adventures
writer: Leonid Gaidai, Yakov Kostyukovskiy, Moris Slobodskoy
actors: Aleksandr Demyanenko, Mikhail Pugovkin, Aleksei Smirnov
plot: Three stories about Shurik - a young student. He fights against criminals, falls in love, confuses apartments, passes exams - he lives after all.
